impact: This gives the checkbox-44 guardrail mapping validator a deterministic committed fixture that maps public process stop gates to allowed agent action gates without automating submission, payment, certification, cancellation, upload, or inspection scheduling.
summary: Add the smallest committed PP&D guardrail mapping fixture for checkbox-45 with only safe read-only and reversible draft-edit agent actions.
target_task: Task checkbox-50: Task checkbox-45: Add the smallest committed guardrail mapping fixture for checkbox-44. Use only safe read-only or reversible draft-edit examples; do not include submission, payment, certification, cancellation, upload, or inspection scheduling automation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
